subcodes.first_line: O thou divine Mish̲kín! A thousand praises be to the one true God that for years thou didst suffer in the path of the Heavenly Beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشکین الهی صد هزار شکر حضرت احدیت را که سالها در غربت و کربت و اسارت در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
